creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #20)

Bob Prohaska started a poudriere bulk on an RPi3B (used
as aarch64) before 2021-Jul-02 and its build of lang/rust
started before then too.

http://www.zefox.org/~bob/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/main-default/2021-07-01_19h00m04s/build.html

shows that rust-1.53.0 built in 38:53:19 . No build error.

(As I write this the overall bulk run is still going.)

I'm not so sure about the libunwind change vs. the building
of rust. The change was not needed for his build of the later
1.53.0 rust version in/for an aarch64 context.
